summary.acquisition_status_persistence: Durable source rows now preserve source_status, acquisition_status, parser_backend, source_type, quality_gate_status, extractable, failure_reason, resolver_source, and OA/PDF/TEI availability where present.
summary.recommender_precedence: Acquisition/parser blockers outrank extractor and demo-loop recommendations; missing_quote_span maps to quoteability remediation.
summary.atlas_trace_contract: Private trace export connects question, cluster, atom, claim, quote, source, concepts, relationships, connection type, maturity, visibility, and why_connected.
summary.atlas_safe_preview: Atlas snapshot preview strips private IDs and raw text while keeping connection counts and maturity.
summary.graph_metrics: Run reports and Atlas snapshots expose claims, atoms, relationships, sources, contradiction/qualification edges, orphan claims, orphan atoms, and relationship density per cluster.

full_verification.reason: No migrations, public card export schema changes, quote validation changes, or source download behavior changes were introduced. Targeted tests plus full safety audit were run for Atlas-safe boundary changes.

notes: Private trace export may include quote_id, claim_id, source_id, and atom_id.
Atlas-safe trace preview strips private IDs, raw text, prompts, local paths, and hidden evaluator notes.

known_risks: Evidence atoms are still mostly one-claim objects; this packet measures the weakness but does not merge atoms.
Relationship density is exposed but relationship generation itself remains thin.
No broad frontend UI was built.

next_recommended_packets.title: Multi-claim Evidence Atom Consolidation
next_recommended_packets.goal: Merge compatible quote-backed claims into stronger evidence atoms with support/contradiction/qualification profiles.

next_recommended_packets.title: Relationship Density Expansion
next_recommended_packets.goal: Generate and validate additional typed relationships per cluster without duplicating existing edges.

next_recommended_packets.title: Question-Aware Source Diversification
next_recommended_packets.goal: Prevent abstract-first runs from reusing narrow evidence across unrelated questions by adding question/source-fit memory and diversity penalties.
